body.value: A simple circuit has a 12 V battery connected to two identical lamps in series. Use this same passage for the next two questions.

preview_existing_cs_figure.alt: Existing non-CS past-paper figure used only to verify the preview renderer image block.
preview_existing_cs_figure.caption: Existing repository image path used by the preview fixture.

PREVIEW_PLAIN_MCQ.label: Plain MCQ
PREVIEW_PLAIN_MCQ.expected: Selecting B should be correct. This fixture has no math, image, table, or code blocks.

PREVIEW_MATH_FRACTION.label: Math block with fraction
PREVIEW_MATH_FRACTION.expected: The display math should render as a real KaTeX fraction for a over b; without KaTeX it should remain visible as plain LaTeX.

PREVIEW_CODE_BLOCK.label: Code block
PREVIEW_CODE_BLOCK.expected: The HTML-like text should display as escaped code and must not create real page elements.

PREVIEW_TABLE_BLOCK.label: Table block
PREVIEW_TABLE_BLOCK.expected: The header row and body rows should render as a table. Selecting C should be correct.

PREVIEW_IMAGE_BLOCK.label: Image block
PREVIEW_IMAGE_BLOCK.expected: The existing repository image should load with alt text and caption. Selecting A should be correct.

PREVIEW_MULTI_SELECT.label: Multi-select
PREVIEW_MULTI_SELECT.expected: Selecting A and C together should be correct; selecting only one should be incorrect.

PREVIEW_NUMERIC_TOLERANCE.label: Numeric tolerance
PREVIEW_NUMERIC_TOLERANCE.expected: Entering 10.4 should be correct because it is within 5% of 10.

PREVIEW_TEXT_ANY.label: Text answer, matchMode any
PREVIEW_TEXT_ANY.expected: Entering either EU or European Union should be correct.

PREVIEW_TEXT_ALL.label: Text answer, matchMode all
PREVIEW_TEXT_ALL.expected: Two input boxes should appear; metre and kilogram are both required.

PREVIEW_SELF_MARK.label: Manual/self-mark
PREVIEW_SELF_MARK.expected: Show model answer should reveal the explanation and then show self-mark buttons.

PREVIEW_SHARED_STIMULUS_Q1.label: Shared stimulus MCQ 1
PREVIEW_SHARED_STIMULUS_Q1.expected: The shared battery passage should appear above this question. Selecting B should be correct.

PREVIEW_SHARED_STIMULUS_Q2.label: Shared stimulus MCQ 2
PREVIEW_SHARED_STIMULUS_Q2.expected: The same shared battery passage should appear here too. Selecting C should be correct.

PREVIEW_LEGACY_ESCAPED.label: Legacy adapted question
PREVIEW_LEGACY_ESCAPED.expected: The legacy flat question should render through the adapter, and angle-bracket text should remain plain text, not HTML.

body.value: Which option is the ordinary plain-text answer?
First
Second
Third

explanation.value: This is the smallest plain MCQ fixture.

body.value: The block below should exercise display math rendering.
A fraction with numerator a and denominator b
A product of a and b
A sum of a and b
The code block intentionally includes script-like text.

<section data-preview="safe">Displayed as code, not HTML.</section>
const escaped = "<script>";
It should create real page elements
It should display as code
It should disappear

explanation.value: Code blocks use textContent, so script-like text is escaped.

body.value: Use the table to choose the correct symbol.
rho
mu
nu

explanation.value: The table maps kinematic viscosity to nu.

body.value: This fixture verifies that an image block can resolve an existing image asset.
The image loads from the registry
The image is missing
The image is rendered as code

explanation.value: The image is declared in the pack-level image registry.

body.value: Select all even numbers.
Enter a value within 5% of 10.

explanation.value: Five percent of 10 is 0.5, so values from 9.5 to 10.5 are accepted.

body.value: Write the abbreviation or full name for the European Union.
Name both SI base units requested here: length and mass.

explanation.value: The SI base unit for length is metre, and for mass is kilogram.

body.value: Explain in one or two sentences why a convergent real sequence is Cauchy.

explanation.value: If x_n converges to L, then for large m and n, both x_m and x_n are close to L, so the triangle inequality makes them close to each other.

body.value: What is the battery voltage in the shared passage?
6 V

explanation.value: The passage states that the battery is 12 V.

body.value: How are the two lamps connected?
Parallel
Not connected
Series

explanation.value: The passage says the lamps are in series.

questions.context: Legacy context should become safe text.
questions.text: Legacy flat text with angle-bracket markup should not become real HTML.
questions.exp: Legacy explanation with tags is adapted as plain text.
